title: sedum globiferum
intro: Sedum globiferum, also known as the Globe Millefolium or the Live Forever plant, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect the body from various infections. Herbal preparations of Sedum globiferum typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
